proposed_diff.working_title: The audio-tools bottleneck in indie pipelines
proposed_diff.thesis: Audio is the last manual stage in a generative-AI-fluent indie pipeline; the gap is structural, not skill-based.
proposed_diff.why_now: ElevenLabs/Suno gains in 2025 are real but the integration story is bad; this is where the next 12 months of wins land.

rationale: Rank 3 of 5 in the optimize round; aggregate 7.0. Solid topic but adjacent to the current Theme rather than core.
resolution_note: Worth writing in the next quarter when ElevenLabs DAW integration matures. Parking — revisit Q3.
